---
format: html
title: refresh_cz_decomposition_upstream()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>refresh_cz_decomposition_upstream</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Refresh CZ Decomposition Upstream Targets</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Refreshes or validates the CZ paleo resolution-test target store.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>refresh_cz_decomposition_upstream(
  refresh_upstream = TRUE,
  store_path = here::here("Data/targets/cz_paleo/pipeline_paleo_resolution_test"),
  pipeline_script = "R/Pipelines/pipeline_paleo_resolution_test.R",
  run_pipeline_fn = run_pipeline,
  tar_meta_fn = targets::tar_meta,
  verbose = TRUE
)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="refresh_upstream">refresh_upstream</code></td>
<td>
<p>Logical. If 'TRUE', rebuilds the upstream targets before validation.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="store_path">store_path</code></td>
<td>
<p>Targets store path to validate.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="pipeline_script">pipeline_script</code></td>
<td>
<p>Pipeline script used for the upstream refresh.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="run_pipeline_fn">run_pipeline_fn</code></td>
<td>
<p>Pipeline runner. Defaults to 'run_pipeline()'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="tar_meta_fn">tar_meta_fn</code></td>
<td>
<p>Metadata reader. Defaults to 'targets::tar_meta()'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="verbose">verbose</code></td>
<td>
<p>Logical. If 'TRUE', progress messages are printed.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>One-row tibble with refresh metadata and validation status.
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
